def negative_python_perf_layer_io_operations_subprocess_per_item():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_io_operations_subprocess_per_item"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: I/O operations. Flag subprocess launches inside item loops where batching or a long-lived worker should be considered."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
